name: Lamb w/ Yoghurt, Coconut Milk & Almond Masala
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinate 2 lb cubed lamb with the saffron threads soaked in boiling water and ghee mixture (including yoghurt, caraway seeds, salt) for at least 30 minutes.
2. Blend almonds and soaking water until smooth paste is formed.
3. In a heavy casserole, heat ghee over moderate heat until hot. Add cinnamon, cardamom, cloves, then onions, garlic, and ginger. Fry until onions are soft and golden brown.
4. Remove lamb with slotted spoon and return to marinade. Add meat to the pot and stir until it browns evenly.
5. Stir in the almond puree, red pepper, and cold water mixture, then add coconut milk. Cook for 10 minutes stirring occasionally.
6. Bring to a boil and partially cover to simmer for 20 minutes or until lamb is tender.
7. Serve by discarding cinnamon and cloves, placing lamb on a heated platter, and pouring sauce over it.
